message:
bd-354t: pi.* connector shim unit tests — 40 tests covering JS→Rust bridge

Tests verify hostcall request/response mapping for all pi.* connectors:
- pi.exec: kind/args/cwd/timeout/stream mapping, success/error resolution
- pi.http: kind/payload mapping, success/error/timeout/denied responses
- pi.session: op dispatch, set_model/set_name/get_state/thinking_level/append_entry
- pi.events: list/emit ops, dispatch result, unsupported op error
- pi.log: kind/payload/success mapping
- pi.ui: select/confirm/input/editor ops, denied error
- Cross-cutting: extension_id correlation, pending count lifecycle, error taxonomy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
